div.head: The Secretary of State to the Chairman of the American Delegation (Davis)
div.p: 2. The Associated Press report this morning states that the British press emphasized the significance of your arrival in connection with larger questions of world peace and economic cooperation and quoted a member of your staff as saying some of the newspaper conjectures are “not far-fetched”. In view of possibility of press printing misleading stories, would suggest that you warn all the members of the Delegation not to make any statements to the press without your authorization.
